rationale: Review 1's sole finding (make the internal-only HopfAlgebra.antipode_convMul_id private) is a real api-design issue confirmed in the diff (public lemma at 64, used solely inside private convInv_mul_cancel). Acting on it produces a tighter public API. Review 2's findings are either minor (add [simp]), based on a nonexistent description claim about antipodeAlgHom, or risk breaking noncomputability; none improve the API design.
